title: tonningia villosa
intro: Tonningia villosa, also known as the hairy tonningia, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is a wild shrub that is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Tonningia villosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Tonningia villosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and its roots and leaves can also be dried and made into capsules or tablets.
